titleStmt.title: SII 38.549: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 549. (A.R. No. 549 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Nīrvaṇṇaperumāḷ shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Rājarāja III Year •••Dhanu, Purva, Avittam Sunday.

summary.p: It registers a gift of 1(3/4) paḻaṅkāśu by Irāppaḍaiveṉṟāṉ, one of the agambaḍiyār Piḷḷaiyār Sōḻagaṅgadēvar to burn a twilight lamp to the god at Tirunīrmalai. A priest of the temple, Yagñanārāyaṇa Bhaṭṭaṉ received the gift and agreed to burn the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarājatevaṟkku yāṇṭu tu dhanu yaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañca
miyum nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattunāḷ tirunirmalai Emperumāṉukkup piḷḷaiyār coḻa
kaṅkatevarakampaṭiyāril Irāppaṭaiveṉṟāṉ vaitta cantiviḷakku 1 Iccanti viḷakkoṉṟukku
Ikkoyilk kāṇiyuṭaiya nampimāril nayimicai Ejñanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ kai�ṇṭaRead koṇṭa. īn this word the medial � is engraved above the line.paḻaṅkācu
1mukkāl Ippaḻaṅkācu Oṉṟemukkāluṅkoṇṭu Ittiruviḷakkuc cantirātittavarai celvatāka ca
mmatittu kaikkoṇṭeṉ Ejñanārāyaṇapaṭṭaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.549 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
